surface_verification.justification: Pure internal Python-library refactor (import-cycle break + test-helper return-shape fixes); no web/CLI runtime surface. Verified by the full unit suites, import-identity smoke tests (moved symbols resolve to the same objects via re-export), and by executing the iterate's own leak-guard which imports the refactored modules.

behaviors.behavior: Cycle A broken: git primitives extracted to lib/git_base.py; worktree_isolation re-exports them; repo_root imports from git_base (no worktree_isolation edge)
behaviors.evidence: import-identity smoke (worktree_isolation.run_git/GitError/main_repo_root/is_worktree IS git_base.*; repo_root.* IS git_base.*) + shared suite 3561 passed incl test_worktree_isolation_lib + check_iterate_isolation runs ALLOW

behaviors.behavior: Cycle B broken: phase_quality model/loaders extracted to _findings_model.py; _aggregates re-exports; _dashboard_render imports from the leaf
behaviors.evidence: import-identity smoke (_aggregates.LoadedFinding IS _findings_model.LoadedFinding; _dashboard_render.count_by_status IS _findings_model.count_by_status) + shared 3561 + compliance 734 passed (consumes phase_quality)

behaviors.behavior: Cycle C broken: classify_finding extracted to security/finding_classify.py; scanner_backend + aikido_client import the leaf (no scanner_backend->aikido_client edge)
behaviors.evidence: import-identity smoke (scanner_backend.classify_finding IS aikido_client.classify_finding IS finding_classify.classify_finding) + security suite 424 passed

behaviors.behavior: Two py/mixed-returns fixed: test helpers end in an explicit return/raise; skip/fail semantics preserved
behaviors.evidence: test_artifact_drift_edge_cases.py + test_security_critical_gate.py PASSED in the shared suite

behaviors.behavior: CodeQL CI marks the 6 py/cyclic-import + 2 py/mixed-returns alerts as fixed
behaviors.reason: Runs in GitHub Actions CodeQL post-merge; the locally-assertable proxies (no static cycle, behavior preserved) are covered by the behaviors above.
